DAL.name: Delta Air Lines
DAL._instructions: Fetch from https://data.sec.gov/api/xbrl/companyfacts/CIK0000027904.json or download 10-K for FY2025 from EDGAR. Extract revenue, operating income, net income. Unit economics (TRASM, CASM) from earnings supplement / 10-K MD&A.

fuel.source: EIA Petroleum - Kerosene-Type Jet Fuel Spot Price
fuel._instructions: Fetch from https://api.eia.gov/v2/petroleum/pri/spt/data/ with api_key. Series: PET.EER_EPJK_PF4_RGC_DPG.M (monthly). Or download from https://www.eia.gov/dnav/pet/pet_pri_spt_s1_m.htm
